meta_description: The UChicago Data Science Institute executes research, outreach, and education in a bold, innovative vision of data science as a new discipline.
all_text_markdown:
[AI + Science](https://datascience.uchicago.edu/research/ai-science)
[Data & Democracy](https://datascience.uchicago.edu/research/data-democracy)
[AICE: AI for Climate](https://datascience.uchicago.edu/research/aice-ai-for-climate)
[Data Ecology](https://datascience.uchicago.edu/research/data-ecology)
[Novel Intelligence](https://datascience.uchicago.edu/research/novel-intelligence)
Work with us!
We have several job opportunities currently open, including faculty positions, postdoctoral and preceptorship programs, and technical and administrative staff positions.
Upcoming Events
Join the DSI community for talks, workshops and other gatherings that spark new collaborations and technological discoveries.

Opportunities
The Data Science Institute offers programs and partnership opportunities for faculty, students, and organizations from the academic, government, business, and non-profit sectors. Learn more about our programs below.
